description: <each ... as person> alias binding (§42). Each row reads multiple fields off the alias (person.name, person.role). Two people render two .person rows with both fields interpolated. Author-class <span>s are NOT unwrapped (only marker-only zero-attr spans are).
rationale: §42 the `as` alias names the per-item value; reading two of its fields in one row body interpolates both. Confirms the normalizer keeps author <span class> elements (unwrap is bounded to marker-only spans).

expect.dom:
• Ada - Pioneer
  • Alan - Founder
